cruceidse.description: Web application designed to compare information quickly and accurately, optimizing internal processes and reducing operational errors. Focused on performance, data clarity, and user experience.

quickBite.title: QuickBite

referrals.title: Become an
referrals.subtext: Earn up to 15% for referring clients.
referrals.description: Refer companies or entrepreneurs who need digital solutions and receive a commission when their project is confirmed.
referrals.description2: You only refer, we handle everything else.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We contact them, diagnose, and provide a quote.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: If the project is confirmed and pays a deposit, you receive your commission.

benefits.title: What do you gain
benefits: You don’t need to sell or manage the client
We handle the proposal and development
rules: Commission is paid only if the project closes and pays a deposit.
The referrer does not negotiate prices or timelines.
The sales process is handled by Identia Studio.
Identia Studio may modify or terminate the program when deemed necessary.
